title: tilia × platyphylla
intro: Tilia × platyphylla, also known as the silver lime or broad-leaved lime, is a hybrid plant derived from the crossing of the Tilia platyphyllos and Tilia cordata species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tilia × platyphylla include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Tilia × platyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
